title: US manufacturing output unchanged in June, but accelerates in second quarter

title: Did PM Modi announce a Rs 25 lakh monthly income scheme? Here's the truth
description: A fake video using artificial intelligence shows Prime Minister Modi promoting an investment scheme. This fraudulent platform falsely promises significant monthly income for a small initial investment. The Press Information Bureau has confirmed the video is fake and warned citizens about the scam. Cyber fraud cases are rising sharply across India, with many reported losses. People should remain vigilant and report suspicious content to prevent financial losses.

title: 8th Global Real Estate Brand Awards: Industry Stalwarts Convene in Bengaluru to Celebrate Innovation and Leadership
description: Bengaluru (Karnataka) [India], July 17: The eighth edition of the Global Real Estate Brand Awards (GREBA) 2026 concluded successfully at the Taj MG Road, Bengaluru. The prestigious summit brought together over 200 prominent real estate developers, policymakers, tech innovators, and corporate leaders to deliberate on the evolving dynamics of India's real estate sector, with a strong focus on artificial intelligence (AI), PropTech, and sustainable urban development.
